UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT SHIRLEY HOLMES'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE FACTS SUPPORTING CONCLUSION OF "SUBSTANDARD" AND "DEFECTIVE" CONDITIONS REQUIRING REPAIRS. (CAUSES OF ACTION 2-9; 14). DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE CAUSES OF ACTION 7-9, 13 NOTWITHSTANDING THE ILLEGAL SUBJECT OF THE CONTRACT, TENANT MAY ENFORCE CONTRACTUAL IMPLIED WARRANTIES AND COVENANTS. DEMURRER TO 12TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE FACTS IN SUPPORT OF EACH ELEMENT OF THIS CAUSE OF ACTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED
ORDER PARTIALLY SUSTAINING AND PARTIALLY OVERRULING DEMURRER

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT SHIRLEY HOLMES' MOTION TO EXPUNGE NOTICE OF PENDENCY OF ACTION (LIS PENDENS) AND FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS IS DENIED IN PART AND GRANTED IN PART. DEFENDANT SHIRLEY HOLMES' MOTION TO EXPUNGE NOTICE OF PENDENCY OF ACTION (LIS PENDENS) IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN PROBABILITY OF PREVAILING ON HIS REAL PROPERTY CLAIM RE: POSSESSION OF THE UNIT. TENANT HAS A RIGHT TO POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES UNTIL HIS TENANCY IS LAWFULLY TERMINATED. CARTER V. COHEN (2010) 188 CAL.APP.4TH 1038; SALAZAR V. MARADEAGA (1992) 10 CAL.APP.4TH SUPP. 1. ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,000. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED (D501)
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARNES, MARK ALLEN AS TO DEFENDANT HOLMES, SHIRLEY , AN INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE SHIRLEY HOLMES TRUST DATED OCTOBER 3, 2005 DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HOLMES, SHIRLEY , AN INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE SHIRLEY HOLMES TRUST DATED OCTOBER 3, 2005 HEARING SET FOR DEC-08-2014 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT SHIRLEY HOLMES' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DEFENDANT'S DEMURER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT AS TO THE 12TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR RETALIATORY EVICTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ALLEGE THAT SHE VACATED THE PREMISES AND DOES NOT ASSERT IN THE OPPOSITION THAT SUCH ALLEGATIONS CAN BE MADE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-31-2015 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2015 Set For Trial On Aug-31-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-26-2014 Continued To Feb-18-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-08-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT SHIRLEY HOLMES' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is defendant's demurer to First Amended Complaint as to the 12th cause of action for retaliatory eviction is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to allege that she vacated the premises and does not assert in the opposition that such allegations can be made. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2014 Continued To Jan-07-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Expunge Ntc Of Pendency Of Action (Lis Pendens) And For Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Sep-23-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the Court adopts the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SHIRLEY HOLMES' Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action (Lis Pendens) And For Attorney Fees And Costs is denied in part and granted in part. DEFENDANT SHIRLEY HOLMES' Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action (Lis Pendens) is DENIED. Plaintiff has shown probability of prevailing on his real property claim re: possession of the unit. Tenant has a right to possession of the premises until his tenancy is lawfully terminated. Carter v. Cohen (2010) 188 Cal.App.4th 1038; Salazar v. Maradeaga (1992) 10 Cal.App.4th Supp. 1. Attorneys fees and costs granted in the amount of $2,000. Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-05-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT SHIRLEY HOLMES's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts supporting conclusion of "substandard" and "defective" conditions requiring repairs. (Causes of action 2-9; 14). Demurrer is overruled as to the causes of action 7-9, 13 notwithstanding the illegal subject of the contract, tenant may enforce contractual implied warranties and covenants. Demurrer to 12th cause of action is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts in support of each element of this cause of action. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
